players.name: MistrGrizz
players.experienceVerdict: low sample on this hero (outside the tracked pool)

notes: Their main damage was Grux (6k physical); 0/5 of us itemized armor — that hurt.
Enemy ran 0/5 on or near their meta core — they were off-meta too, the win was there.

coaching.headline: The clean sheet: three fights won, none lost, nobody caught out alone all game, towers 2-0 — the blueprint film.
coaching.team: We played this exactly the way the wins are drawn up. Nobody on our side died outside a fight all game (they did, five times), and every fight happened on our terms: 4-0 at our Fangtooth at 6.5, 5-1 at our outer tower at 13 against their full five, 4-0 at their River at 16.1. The 6.5 fight is the one to rewatch — Zinx and Drongo beat four of them 4-0 and cashed it straight into Fangtooth, with Mini Prime following at 9 minutes — a fight AND the map at once. Objectives finished 12-7 and towers 2-0 in 17 minutes. Murdock and Drongo went a combined 16/0.
coaching.whatShiftedIt: The 6.5-minute fight at our Fangtooth: two of us (Zinx and Drongo) beat four of them 4-0 cashed into Fangtooth, with Mini Prime following at 9 minutes — the map lead never flipped after that.

perPlayer.7c8ab99c-31c5-4ea5-a6fa-e0d6417c3f1b: Mr_Meat31 went 8/0/0 on Murdock in the offlane — even early, ours late — at 8.6 CS a minute. A deathless eight-kill side lane is the whole assignment; the only nudge is the build, where Lightning Hawk and Imperator (the 54.1% core with Vanquisher) never arrived in the short game.
perPlayer.16f28434-561f-4f23-9454-40321f4a1ef3: Goldilocks324 took the quiet game on purpose: Gideon finished 0/1/11 — damage light at 525 a minute against the 911 norm, but a hand in eleven kills. In a film where Murdock and Drongo went 16-0 combined, that is the mid doing setup work that shows up in everyone else's line.
perPlayer.a0c393cc-1437-4bdc-8168-64676ce2166c: Cuban Noobster lost the support matchup on paper — Zinx into Riktor read theirs all game — and won it in practice: 1/0/11, including the 6.5 fight where two of us beat four. The one real note is vision: 5 wards against the 13 norm; a longer game punishes that gap.
perPlayer.10edbf65-457d-48d0-9151-9df5b4fcb40a: Willy Guggenheim went 8/0/3 on Drongo at 8.4 CS a minute with the team-high 14076 hero damage, and was half of the 6.5 Fangtooth fight that decided the game. The only unclaimed value was the 16.1 fight — won 4-0 with nothing taken after it.
perPlayer.a412baf3-dd17-4f89-8ecf-9d0704f3a79e: Xeebs did the objective lifting: 15119 objective damage on Khaimera — far the team high — while soaking 23924 and going 3/2/6. Both Fangtooths (7 and 14) and Mini Prime (9) came off that pressure.

threats: Chain-CC risk (5 hard-CC abilities, ~3.5s of lockdown): Grux Crush (knockup 0.5s), Riktor Riplash (pull), Riktor Shock Therapy (silence 0.8s), Riktor Skewer (suppress 1.25s), Iggy & Scorch Inferno (knockback). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
Dive threat on our backline: Serath. Assign peel for the carry and ward the flanks.
synergy: Little hard CC on our side — we can't force a pick. Play for poke/objectives and punish their cooldowns, don't flip coin-toss 5v5s.
We have sustain (Zinx) — favor the longer fight where our heals out-grind them.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Static Trap root → Buckshot → Hot Pursuit AS → Long Arm of the Law global snipe
ourKits.winCondition: trap for the root, then out-range with Shots Fired and finish with the global ult
ourKits.passive: every 5th basic is a long-range bonus shot
ourKits.playWith: frontline/peel to protect his low mobility
ourKits.playAgainst: almost no escape — engage past the trap and he dies

ourKits.combo: Void Breach slow → Cosmic Rift → Black Hole on the grouped enemies
ourKits.winCondition: land Black Hole / Cosmic Rift on a clumped team for AoE burst
ourKits.passive: an ability-empowered basic tethers a target for bonus damage
ourKits.playWith: hard engage that clumps enemies into his Black Hole
ourKits.playAgainst: immobile with long cooldowns — dodge the skillshots and dive him once Black Hole is down

ourKits.combo: Ricochet stun → Bad Medicine zone → Infuse heal an ally → Neural Regenesis revive
ourKits.winCondition: keep an ally alive with Infuse + the revive ult and poke with Ricochet
ourKits.playWith: a carry she can pocket-heal and revive
ourKits.playAgainst: she can't heal herself — dive HER; bait the revive before committing

ourKits.combo: Old Rusty slow → Gag Grenade silence → Rad Rounds basics → Shrapnel Cannon armor shred
ourKits.winCondition: kite back, stack Wastelander bleed and Rad Rounds, melt from range
ourKits.playWith: peel and frontline so he can free-fire
ourKits.playAgainst: low mobility — dive him or break LoS through his poke; he folds to hard engage

ourKits.combo: Ambush leap → Unleash AS → Cull stun, Invigorate to cleanse+heal
ourKits.winCondition: stick on one target, stun with Cull and out-sustain via Spirit Regen
ourKits.playWith: follow-up burst inside his Cull stun
ourKits.playAgainst: ANTI-HEAL is mandatory — it guts his whole kit; kite the leap and CC through Invigorate

enemyKits.combo: Smash 'n Grab pull → Crush knockup → Warlord's Challenge stun → bleed-stacked basics
enemyKits.winCondition: land the pull→knockup chain to lock a target while bleed and AS shred them
enemyKits.passive: basics stack a bleed for sustained damage
enemyKits.playWith: follow-up burst inside his knockup/stun window
enemyKits.playAgainst: telegraphed engage — bait Crush/Pull, then punish; kite his slow start

enemyKits.combo: Piercing Shot poke → Heightened Senses AS → Hail of Arrows zone → Inner Fire ult
enemyKits.winCondition: ramp Relentless + AS and sustained-DPS the front down
enemyKits.playWith: heavy peel — she's immobile and pure DPS
enemyKits.playAgainst: she has zero escape — hard-engage her and she dies first

enemyKits.combo: Ascend dive → Heaven's Fury multi-strike → Chastise slow → Heresy form ult, resets on takedowns
enemyKits.winCondition: dive the backline and snowball Heresy resets
enemyKits.playWith: a frontline that creates her dive angle
enemyKits.playAgainst: peel the backline — deny the first kill and her resets dry up

enemyKits.combo: Riplash pull → Shock Therapy silence → Skewer suppress ult
enemyKits.winCondition: pull a target in and chain silence+suppress for a guaranteed kill
enemyKits.playWith: burst that deletes his pulled/suppressed target
enemyKits.playAgainst: respect Riplash range — stay spaced; cleanse/QSS the suppress

enemyKits.combo: Oil Spill → Molotov ignite → Flame Turret → Inferno knockback ult
enemyKits.winCondition: layer fire zones on a choke/objective and burn the team
enemyKits.playWith: CC that holds enemies in his fire
enemyKits.playAgainst: don't fight in his zones — flank; kill the turret, dive him

itemTimelineNote: estMin = first minute the role's measured median gold curve covers the cumulative inventory cost (slot order ≈ purchase order) — THEORY, no purchase timestamps in either API

fights.note: caught-out = deaths outside every clustered fight; costs/conversion use a 90s window over the per-event objective+tower stream; itemGap counts participants' items est. online (median-gold model, THEORY)
